name: agentlas-core-engine-meta-agent
description: Three-agent meta-agent team for creating single agents, creating multi-agent teams, and packaging existing agents into Agentlas architecture.

interface.shortDescription: Create or package Agentlas-compatible agents and teams.
interface.longDescription: A portable three-agent meta-agent team: Single Agent Builder, Multi Agent Team Builder, and Agentlas Packager. It creates self-evolving single agents, full multi-agent teams, and packages existing agents into Agentlas architecture.
interface.defaultPrompt: Use the Agentlas Core Engine Meta-Agent Team to create or package an Agentlas-compatible agent.
